narrative:
Precinct Edinburg A (precinct in Portage County) has 963 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a clear Republican lean of 7.5 percentage points.
